positive: A vibrant, repeating pattern featuring stylized celestial bodies (planets, stars, moons) and geometric shapes. Pop Art aesthetic, bright primary colors (yellow, teal, orange), clean vector graphics, seamless repeat pattern, comic book halftone dots effect.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, realism, messy, organic lines, shadows
